description: Renovation to convert residential space to commercial for a Specialty Restaurant. Scope of work to include relocating gas, plumbing,electrical and handicap ramp. Extend permit ot 12/11/21.

Repairs to the existing plumbing waste pipe system serving the school kitchen and restrooms. Work includes replacement of underground piping, modifications to the existing grease trap, and paving repairs at areas impacted by the work.

Emergency Permit for installation of roof stabilization/shoring components as required to prevent failure of existing roof structure. Building is completely unoccupied and site is fenced off from all adjacent areas. No occupancy to be taken, scope of work limited to shoring only as required for emergency stabilization. No additional work to be performed. Building has no electrical, water, gas or sewer service.

Facade renovations including adding an historic awning to 3944 Magazine Street and a new entrance to 3948 Magazine Street (which is on the same parcel). Renovation also includes exterior paint and adding a couple non-structural demising walls on the interior. We are also going to be doing some electrical work as well.

description: Renovation to the second floor private dining venue CALCASIEU to include new corridor wall with operable doors, new HOFCOR moveable partition, new lighting and new finishes as per plans.

Proposed site improvements include a bus wash down shed located on the south-west square of the site with driveway access connecting to existing paved driveway. Rest of the south-west square and south-east square area will be developed into parking lot. It is proposed to detain site runoff by providing a porous stone permeable paving parking lot with TrueGrid Paver system to accommodate vehicular traffic. Note: the bus wash down shed was removed from this application by applicant during review.
